_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Endstone
author: support@phosphor.host
description: Endstone offers a high-performance, easy-to-use plugin API for Minecraft: Bedrock Edition servers, supporting both Python and C++ plugins. It launches the official Bedrock Dedicated Server (BDS) with the Endstone runtime injected via LD_PRELOAD. The BDS version is pinned to the installed Endstone version. Runtime image must stay on Python 3.12 to match the install venv.
startup: python -m pip install -U pip && pip install -U \"{{ENDSTONE_VERSION}}\" && python -m endstone -s . -y

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Endstone Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
apt update
apt install -y curl

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

if [ ! -f server.properties ]; then
    echo -e "Downloading server.properties"
    curl -o server.properties https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EndstoneMC/pterodactyl/main/server.properties
fi

export HOME=/mnt/server

echo -e "Installation complete"
exit 0

variables.name: Endstone Version
variables.description: The version of the Endstone pip package to install (e.g. 0.11.4). Leave as "endstone" for the newest release. This also determines which Bedrock Dedicated Server version is used.
